title: A Visit to the Fire Station
synopsis: A school visit to the fire station shows children how firefighters help their town.
sentences: The class walked to the fire station in pairs after morning registration.
A firefighter welcomed them at the door and showed them the bright red truck inside.
The truck looked bigger and taller than it did on the road.
The children gathered around while the firefighter pointed to the hoses, helmets, and ladders.
He explained that speed mattered, but safety mattered just as much.
One student asked how heavy the uniform was.
The firefighter smiled and let them feel one of the thick jackets.
It was much heavier than anyone expected.
Outside, they watched water spray high into the air from a practice hose.
The children clapped when sunlight made the drops sparkle.
Before leaving, the teacher thanked the firefighters for their work.
The class walked back to school talking excitedly the whole way.
